name: Survivalist

signatureWeapon.name: Explosive-Tipped Crossbow
signatureWeapon.description: A silent crossbow that fires explosive bolts. Can penetrate cover and detonate on impact or after a short delay. Low noise profile makes it suitable for tactical engagements.

grenade: Incendiary Grenade — applies Burn status effect to enemies in the blast area
keyPassives: E.M.I. — 15% increased Assault Rifle damage
Running The Gun — 15% increased Shotgun damage
Gunslinger — 10% increased Sidearm damage
Signature Weapon Damage — up to 145% increased signature weapon damage (multi-tier)
Survivalist Tactical Link — teammates deal 10% bonus damage to targets affected by status effects
Elite Defense — 20% increased Protection from Elites
Triage Specialist — 15% increased outgoing healing
Crunch Time — 10% skill cooldown reduction while in cover

name: Demolitionist

signatureWeapon.name: M32A1 Multi-shot Grenade Launcher
signatureWeapon.description: A six-round revolver-style grenade launcher that fires explosive grenades. Deals heavy area damage and can knock enemies out of cover. Each hit restores ammo to the signature weapon bar.

grenade: Fragmentation Grenade — applies Bleed status effect on detonation
keyPassives: Spray and Pray — 15% increased SMG damage
Onslaught — 15% increased LMG damage
Gunslinger — 10% increased Sidearm damage
Signature Weapon Damage — up to 145% increased signature weapon damage (multi-tier)
Explosive Ordnance — 25% increased Explosive damage
Demolitionist Tactical Link — teammates gain 5% damage bonus to targets out of cover
Incombustible — 20% increased Burn resistance

name: Sharpshooter

signatureWeapon.name: TAC-50 C Rifle
signatureWeapon.description: A .50 caliber anti-material sniper rifle capable of penetrating multiple targets with a single shot. Deals extreme damage and can destroy enemy equipment in one hit. Awarded as the Sharpshooter's primary signature weapon.

grenade: Flashbang Grenade — blinds and stuns enemies in the blast radius
keyPassives: One In The Head — 25% increased Headshot damage
Sharpshooter Tactical Link — all teammates closer to the enemy than the Sharpshooter gain 10% Headshot damage bonus
Deft Hands — 30% increased Reload Speed
Breath Control — 30% increased Weapon Stability
Gunslinger — 10% increased Sidearm damage
Signature Weapon Damage — up to 145% increased signature weapon damage (multi-tier)

name: Gunner

signatureWeapon.name: Minigun
signatureWeapon.description: A belt-fed, multi-barrel rotary machine gun with an extremely high rate of fire. While the signature weapon is active, each bullet hit restores 1% armor to the player, up to a maximum of 50%. Requires a spin-up period before reaching full fire rate.

grenade: Riot Foam Grenade — immobilizes enemies by covering them in adhesive foam (applies Ensnare)
keyPassives: Incessant — 5% armor on kill (stacking with each tier)
Hardened Armor — armor kits restore 50% bonus armor on top of normal 100% repair for 10 seconds
Supply Line — generates 10% of total ammo pool every 60 seconds; gives teammates 5%
Signature Weapon Damage — up to 40% increased signature weapon damage per tier (4 tiers)
Gunner Tactical Link — (ammo and resilience focused team passive)
Armor per Minigun Bullet — each active bullet hit restores 1% armor up to 50% max
weaponDamageBonus: LMGs are the primary pairing; minigun armor-on-hit mechanic rewards sustained fire with any weapon

name: Technician

signatureWeapon.name: P-017 Missile Launcher
signatureWeapon.description: A guided missile launcher capable of locking onto and targeting up to 6 enemies simultaneously before firing a salvo. Each missile homes in on its designated target. Excellent for clearing multiple priority targets or eliminating enemy skill proxies.

grenade: EMP Grenade — damages and disrupts enemy technology, applying Disrupt status effect to all electronics in the blast radius
keyPassives: Amped — grants +1 Skill Tier (a defining and unique passive among all specializations)
Overclocked CPU — 10% increased Skill Damage
Dismantling — increased damage against robotic enemies (drones, dogs, Warhounds)
Emergency Patch — armor kits also repair and restore friendly skill proxies in range
Technician Tactical Link — teammates can benefit from Artificer Hive skill efficiency boost
Signature Weapon Damage — up to 145% increased signature weapon damage (multi-tier)
weaponDamageBonus: Pistols/Sidearms (secondary focus); primary value is the +1 Skill Tier passive rather than weapon damage bonuses
bestFor: skill builds at max skill tier
hybrid weapon-skill builds needing extra skill tier

name: Firewall

signatureWeapon.name: K8-JetStream Flamethrower
signatureWeapon.description: A military-grade flamethrower with a 15-meter arc of fire. Deals continuous fire damage and applies Burn status effect to all enemies in the cone. Functions exclusively in conjunction with the Striker Shield, requiring it to be active to use the flamethrower effectively.

grenade: Cluster Grenade — splits on detonation into multiple smaller explosive bursts covering a wider area
keyPassives: Firewall Tactical Link — allies deal 10% more damage to all enemies within 10 meters of the Firewall agent
Fiery Response — apply Burn to enemies within 5 meters when the Firewall agent's armor breaks
Firestarter Shotgun — increases the probability of enemies igniting on fire from shotgun shots
Ammo Acquisition — killing enemies within 10 meters adds 3 rounds to the signature weapon ammo bar
Shock Hardened Frame — adds a health bonus to the Striker Shield
High-Octane Gasoline Mixture — enhances flamethrower volatility and damage
Signature Weapon Damage — up to 40% increased signature weapon damage per tier (4 tiers)
weaponDamageBonus: Shotguns (via Firestarter Shotgun passive) and close-range weapons benefit most from the 10m tactical link radius
